subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of His remembrance, the One remembered in this Revelation, that thereby the dwellers in the graves may be awakened and arise in support of God's Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر ذکره المذکور فی هذا الظهور لینتبه به اهل القبور و یقوموا علی امر الله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @living waters; water of life, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
